evidence: Our framework, termed Vision ARC (VARC), achieves 60.4% accuracy on the ARC-1 benchmark, substantially outperforming existing methods.
Abstraction and inference can arise directly from visual learning, without explicit linguistic intermediates.
VARC achieves 54.5% accuracy on the ARC-1 benchmark, using a small model... substantially surpasses the best recurrent methods.
Combining VARC models through ensembling... improves accuracy to 60.4%, matching the reported average human performance.
Our VARC with 18M parameters is ~10 points better than TRM on ARC-1, a >20% relative improvement.
our model performs fully feedforward inference, with no recurrence involved in reasoning.
VARC correctly solves these challenging tasks.

Layers at different depths tend to focus on different structures. Early layers tend to focus on local transformations and context. Middle layers tend to perform a more non-local connection... The deep layers are more task-specialized.
